chunks.text: Women in Business: Q&A with Fang Yu - EECS at Berkeley EECS Alumna Fang Yu (Ph.D. CS 2006), co-founder of DataVisor and expert in “big-data for security,” joins with Yinglian Xie to answer questions posed by Laura Dunn of the Huffington Post. “It’s important to remember that true innovation is a process, as long as you continue to learn and grow throughout it, you can make yourself, and your company, better.” Categories Alumni Diversity Entrepreneurship Industry View Open Faculty Positions
